selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.

  "opinion": "I have always been quite proactive in staying informed, even at my age. I enjoy reading books and keeping up with news, especially on topics like health because it affects everyone so much. After researching myself through official sources and trusted articles, I decided to get vaccinated as quickly as possible once it was available.\n\nBut discussing this topic with others has been challenging. Some people are very scared about new things; they want reassurance from me or anyone who seems knowledgeable. My good mental health helps me stay calm during these talks, but my high neuroticism score means that sometimes unexpected news can worry me a lot. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
I have always been quite proactive in staying informed, even at my age. I enjoy reading books and keeping up with news, especially on topics like health because it affects everyone so much. When the subject of COVID vaccines came up, I felt a strong desire to understand what was happening. After researching myself through official sources and trusted articles, I decided to get vaccinated as quickly as possible once it was available.

But discussing this topic with others has been challenging. Some people are very scared about new things; they want reassurance from me or anyone who seems knowledgeable. My good mental health helps me stay calm during these talks, but my high neuroticism score means that sometimes unexpected news can worry me a lot. I always remind myself to be patient and understanding.

In our community here in Bologna, many elderly people rely on family for information about vaccines because they don't spend much time online themselves or with social media. So it's important when my children share something they learned from reliable health organizations that we discuss it calmly together before sharing opinions widely.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary:
As an elderly person with a vocational diploma, I have limited formal education but still manage to stay informed through reading and news sources.

My high neuroticism makes me sensitive to alarming information about vaccines or COVID-19 in general.

Being native-born Italian means our family has deep roots here; we value community health discussions while being mindful of differing opinions due possibly to religious beliefs.
